headline: Evercore Reiterates Outperform Rating for Insulet Corp. (PODD)
summary: Insulet Corp. (NASDAQ:PODD) is one of the 7 oversold stocks to buy with double-digit ROE growth. On April 6, Evercore ISI reduced the price target on Insulet Corp. (NASDAQ:PODD) from $340 to $240, while maintaining an Outperform rating on the stock. Despite the downward revision to the target price, the stock still offers an adjusted […]
